lines.name: Description
lines.value:
This model can be attached to the following units:
- **^^Flawless Blades^^**

lines.name: Description
lines.value: At the start of the Fight phase, if this model is not leading a unit, until the end of the phase, it has the Fights First ability.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model makes an attack that targets a **^^Character, Monster^^** or **^^Walker^^** unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll and re-roll the Wound roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: In your Shooting phase and the Fight phase, after this model has finished making its attacks, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the battle, that enemy unit is poisoned. At the start of each player's Command phase, roll one D6 for each poisoned enemy unit on the battlefield: on a 4+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: At the start of your opponent's Command phase, select one of the abilities in the Daemon Prince of Slaanesh section. Until the start of your opponent's next Command phase, this model has that ability.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model has 1-6 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: If this model is in your army, it must be your **^^Warlord^^**.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model is leading a unit, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the **^^[LETHAL HITS]^^** ability.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, this model can use this ability. If it does so, until the end of the phase, add 3 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by this model and improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of those weapons by 1.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: If this model is attached to an **^^Emperor's Children Battleline^^** unit during the Declare Battle Formations step, this model has the Infiltrators and Scouts 6" ability.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This model can be attached to the following units: **^^Infractors; Tormentors^^**

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This model can be attached to the following units: **^^Emperor's Children Terminator Squad; Noise Marines^^**

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model is leading a unit, ranged weapons equipped by that unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: In your Shooting phase, after this model's unit has shot, select one enemy **^^Infantry^^** unit hit by one or more of those attacks and roll three D6: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound. If an enemy suffers one or more mortal wounds as a result of this ability, it must take a Battle-shock test.

entries.name: Screamer pistol and close combat weapon

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This model can be attached to the following units: **^^Infractors; Noise Marines; Tormentors^^**

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model is leading a unit, each time a ranged attack targets that unit, models in it have the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one INFANTRY unit hit by one or more of those attacks made with its Agonising Energies. Until the start of your next turn, that unit is wracked with agonies. While a unit is wracked with agonies, subtract 2" from its Move characteristic and subtract 2 from charge rolls made for it.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model is within 3" of one or more friendly **^^Slaanesh Infantry^^**, this model has the Lone Operative ability.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While a friendly **^^Slaanesh^^** unit is within 6" of this model, if that unit made a Charge move this turn, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of melee weapons equipped by that unit by 1.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: If this model is destroyed by a melee attack, if it has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 2+, do not remove it from play. This model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

units.name: Daemon Prince of Slaanesh with Wings

profiles.name: Daemon Prince of Slaanesh with Wings

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of this model and roll one D6 for each of this model's remaining wounds: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound (to a maximum of 6 mortal wounds).

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time an attack is allocated to this model, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: At the end of your Shooting phase or the Fight phase, if the bearer's unit destroyed one or more enemy units this phase, the bearer's unit takes a Leadership test. If that test is passed, you gain 1CP.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: At the end of your Command phase, if this unit is within range of an objective marker you control, that objective marker remains under your control until your opponent's Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: At the end of your Shooting phase or the Fight phase, if the bearer's unit destroyed one or more enemy units this phase, the bearer's unit takes a Leadership test. If that test is passed, you gain 1CP.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: At the end of your Shooting phase or the Fight phase, if the bearer's unit destroyed one or more enemy units this phase, the bearer's unit takes a Leadership test. If that test is passed, you gain 1CP.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time a model in this unit targets an enemy unit with a melee attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1. If that enemy unit is within range of an objective marker, you can re-roll the Wound roll instead.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: At the end of your Shooting phase or the Fight phase, if the bearer's unit destroyed one or more enemy units this phase, the bearer's unit takes a Leadership test. If that test is passed, you gain 1CP.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this unit is selected to fight, it can call upon daemonic patrons. If it does, until the end of the phase, each time a model in this unit makes an attack. an unmodified Wound roll of 3+ scores a Critical Wound. At the end of the Fight phase, if this unit called upon daemonic patrons this phase and no enemy models were destroyed by attacks made by models in this unit this phase, one model in this unit is destroyed.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Models in this unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: In your Shooting phase, each time this unit is selected to shoot, if it makes one or more shooting attacks and all of those attacks target the same enemy unit, until the end of the turn, each time this unit declares a charge, if that enemy unit is a target of that charge, you can re-roll the Charge roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Models in this unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Once per turn, when an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within 9" of this unit, this unit can make a Normal move of up to 6".

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time a unit disembarks from this model after it has made a Normal move, that unit is still eligible to declare a charge this turn.

lines.name: Capacity
lines.value: This model has a transport capacity of 14 **^^Emperor's Children Infantry^^** models. Each **^^Terminator^^** and ^^**Flawless Blade^^** model takes up the space of 2 models.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the start of your next Shooting phase, each time a Battle-shock or Leadership test is taken for that enemy unit, subtract 1 from that test.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit that it moved over during that move and roll two D6, adding 1 to each result if that enemy unit can ^^FLY^^: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This model has a 5+ invulnerable save.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model makes an attack, if it is below its Starting Strength, add 1 to the Hit roll. If this model is also Below Half-Strength, add 1 to the Wound roll as well.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This model has a 5+ invulnerable save.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Units can disembark from this **^^Vehicle**^^ after it has Advanced. Units that do so count as having made a Normal move that phase, and cannot declare a charge in the same turn, but can otherwise act normally.

lines.name: Capacity
lines.value: This model has a transport capacity of 12 **^^Emperor's Children Infantry^^**models (excluding ^^**Terminator**^^ and ^^**Flawless Blade**^^ models).

lines.name: Keywords
lines.value: Hazardous, Devastating Wounds, Psychic, Sustained Hits 3

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: You can re-roll Advance and Charge rolls made for this model.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: At the start of the first battle round, select one enemy unit to be this model's quarry. Each time this model makes a melee attack that targets its quarry, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll. Each time this model's quarry is destroyed, select one new enemy unit to be this model's quarry.

lines.name: Keywords
lines.value: Hazardous, Devastating Wounds, Psychic, Sustained Hits 3

lines.value: Hazardous, Devastating Wounds, Psychic, Sustained Hits 3

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While a friendly ^^**Legions of Excess**^^ unit is within 6" of this model, improve the Armour Penetration of melee weapons in that unit by 1.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time an attack targets this model, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: The bearer has a Save characteristic of 3+.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Models in the bearer's unit have a Leadership characteristic of 6+.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Add 1 to Charge rolls made for the bearer's unit.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: At the start of the Fight phase, each enemy unit in Engagement Range of one or more units from your army with this ability must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from that test if that enemy unit is Below Half-strength.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Models in this unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Models in the bearer's unit have a Leadership characteristic of 6+.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Add 1 to Charge rolls made for the bearer's unit.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Models in this unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time an enemy unit (excluding ^^**Monsters**^^ and **^^Vehicles**^^) within Engagement Range of one or more units from your army with this ability Falls Back, models in that unit must take Desperate Escape tests. When doing so, if that enemy unit is also Battle-shocked, subtract 1 from each of those Desperate Escape tests.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Add 1 to Charge rolls made for the bearer's unit.
